title: Learning Entry
description: A single learning entry appended by a shared skill via log-learning.py. schema_version and timestamp are injected server-side by the writer; they are not supplied by the skill.

skill.description: The slug of the shared skill that generated this entry (e.g. 'debug', 'run-tasks').

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Injected by log-learning.py.

trigger.description: Label for the class of correction-event that prompted this learning. Open vocabulary: named values for known patterns; 'uncategorized' for novel patterns that must carry a free-text trigger_label. Grounding, not enum-match, is the membership gate.

trigger_label.description: Required non-null snake_case string when trigger == 'uncategorized'; must be null for all other trigger values. Recurring uncategorized labels are promoted to named trigger values in this schema.

evidence.description: WHAT happened this run. Must be observable and run-specific. For aggregated observations (redundant_effort, backtrack, or any 'tried N times' pattern), must list discrete quoted transcript anchors rather than asserting a bare count. Count is derived as len(anchors) by the grounding judge.

learning.description: WHY it happened and the general reusable rule that must hold beyond this run. If the sentence only describes this run it belongs in evidence, not learning.

suggested_fix.description: The concrete skill or script edit that would prevent recurrence (nullable). Consumed by improve-skill when it applies entries.

examples.evidence: Bash tool returned 'command not found: jq' when running the JSON filter step.
examples.learning: Check for jq availability with 'which jq' before piping to it; fall back to python -m json.tool when jq is absent.
examples.suggested_fix: Add a jq availability check at the start of any skill step that pipes to jq.

examples.evidence: Task file was read at start of run and cached; a mid-run status update to T-0015 was not reflected in subsequent blocked_by checks.
examples.learning: Re-read the task JSON before each blocked_by check rather than relying on the in-memory snapshot from run start.
examples.suggested_fix: In the blocked_by check loop, call Read on the task file path to get the latest status rather than using the initial parse result.
